name: Community Park Cleanup
description: Help us clean up Oakwood Park! Garbage bags, gloves, and free morning coffee/donuts will be provided for all volunteers.

name: Local Farmers Market
description: Support our local farmers and artisans. Come by to buy fresh vegetables, homemade jams, pastries, and handmade crafts.

name: Annual Charity 5K Run
description: Join the annual fun run to raise funds for the Greenwood Public Library. All fitness levels are welcome to walk or run.

name: Summer Acoustic Concert
description: Enjoy a beautiful evening of live music in the park with local singer-songwriters. Bring your own blankets and lawn chairs.

name: Jazz in the Square
description: An outdoor jazz event featuring local bands. Delicious food trucks and beverage vendors will be on-site.
